name: wind-power
short_effect: When hit by a wind move, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
effect_text: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
flavor_text: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
